name: Music Assistant
description: Built-in Music Assistant search, queue, library, and playback tools.
capabilities: Searches and browses Music Assistant tracks, albums, artists, playlists, radio, audiobooks, and podcasts, and controls Music Assistant players.

built_in_toggle.shared_description: Expose Music Assistant search, queue, library, and playback tools.
built_in_toggle.profile_disable_description: Prevents this profile from using Music Assistant search, queue, library, and playback tools.
